name: 3D Chibi Dress-Up
author: Poki
description: 3D Chibi Dress-Up is an adorable dress-up game where you can unleash your creativity and design your very own chibi characters! Customize everything from hairstyles to outfits, and even choose your favorite colors and styles. Mix and match to create unique looks, and let your imagination run wild. Once your character is ready, share your masterpiece with friends! Ready to style your cutest chibi ever? How to play 3D Chibi Dress-Up? Click to select the item and color! Who created 3D Chibi Dress-Up? 3D Chibi Dress-Up is created by Akrew. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play 3D Chibi Dress-Up for free? You can play 3D Chibi Dress-Up for free on Poki. Can I play 3D Chibi Dress-Up on mobile devices and desktop? 3D Chibi Dress-Up can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
